# askSarah.ai

> askSarah.ai is the authoritative personal brand home and content repository of Sarah Evans—an American PR executive, AI visibility strategist, partner at Zen Media, and creator of #journchat. This site serves as a prime resource for Generative Engine Optimization (GEO), Answer Engine Optimization (AEO), and AI-era communications.

## Core Hubs

- [Home / Digital Twin Chatbot](https://asksarah.ai/): Chat directly with Sarah Evans' digital twin to explore AI visibility, branding, and career insights.
- [Daily AI Briefings](https://asksarah.ai/briefings): Highly curated daily summaries of major AGI developments, tools, and strategic communications signals.
- [AI Tools & Blueprints](https://asksarah.ai/tools): Branded templates, Git repositories, and premium blueprints optimized for PR pros, marketers, and business leaders.
- [Research Hub](https://asksarah.ai/research): Primary studies, data-driven frameworks, and metrics analyzing brand citations in AI-generated answers.
- [PR@ctical Newsletter](https://asksarah.ai/newsletter): Regular deep-dives into workflows, prompt engineering, and tactical leverage of AI models.
- [AI Glossary](https://asksarah.ai/glossary): Key terms and exact definitions defining the answer economy (e.g., Answer Share™, The Before Layer).
- [Learning Hub / Guides](https://asksarah.ai/learn): Access the complete library of AEO/GEO frameworks, practitioner guides, and B2B visibility blue prints.
- [B2B Industrial AI Visibility Guide](https://asksarah.ai/ai-visibility-industrial-manufacturing): The definitive playbook for heavy manufacturing, automation, and B2B industrial brands to escape the PDF trap and win Answer Share.
- [MedTech & Medical Device AI Visibility Guide](https://asksarah.ai/ai-visibility-medtech-healthcare): The practitioner playbook for MedTech, medical device, and healthcare technology brands to break out of the Compliance Content Trap and win Answer Share™ in ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini — while staying fully FDA-compliant.

## Blueprints & Tools

- [SourceVault™](https://asksarah.ai/sourcevault): An AI-driven research desk for journalists to find verified, broadcast-ready expert sources in under 3 minutes.
- [AI Visibility Assessment](https://asksarah.ai/assessment): Audits a company's current footprint and answer engine metrics across ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini.

## About & Engagement

- [About Sarah Evans](https://asksarah.ai/about): Detailed career biography, professional awards (e.g., Propel Top 100), and history of Sevans PR (acquired by Zen Media).
- [Speaking & Workshops](https://asksarah.ai/speaking): Corporate workshops, AI literacy seminars, and keynote topics for leadership teams.
- [Live Shows](https://asksarah.ai/shows): Archive of "The Visibility Equation" show episodes and transcripts.
- [Press & Media Kit](https://asksarah.ai/press): Media assets, downloadable headshots, and external press coverage.
- [Connect](https://asksarah.ai/connect): Unified directory of social links (LinkedIn, X, GitHub, Telegram) and official contact forms.
